context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the liveview instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Define the LiveView's purpose and URL (via `live "/path"` in router).

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Define the project-specific `mount/3` contract: which params and session keys this feature uses, what assigns it sets.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: List all events (`handle_event`, `handle_info`, `handle_params`) this LiveView must handle.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Write test covering: mount renders, key assigns present, events update socket, streams for collections.

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Verify the test **FAILS** with `mix test test/my_app_web/live/my_live_test.exs` — failure must be "module not defined".

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run focused test: `mix test test/my_app_web/live/my_live_test.exs` — must **PASS**.

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run full suite: `mix test` — must **PASS**.

checklist.name: instruction-8
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Verify the route exists and `mount/3` returns `{:ok, socket}`.

checklist.name: instruction-9
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Check template for missing assigns — unset assigns crash on render.
